### What was done and why

| Signal | Resource | Code Systems | Verified Count |
|---|---|---|---|
| **CAD / Ischemic Heart Disease diagnosis** | `Condition` | SNOMED CT (ischemic HD, coronary arteriosclerosis, atherosclerosis, multi-vessel disease, CAD due to DM) + ICD-10-CM I25.x + ICD-9-CM 414.x | **1,232** |
| **CABG procedure** | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT (umbrella + graft-count subtypes + vein/arterial variants + emergency CABG) + CPT 33510–33536 | **88** |
| **PCI procedure** | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT (angioplasty, stent placement, atherectomy, rotablation, emergency PCI, vessel-specific PCI) + CPT 92920–92943 | **375** |

**Strategy:** Playbooks **1** (subtypes unioned), **6** (procedurally defined), and **12** (cohort = OR). The evaluator should **union** all three patient sets — a patient qualifies if they appear in *any* of the three queries. The server was confirmed to encode Conditions in SNOMED CT + ICD-10-CM + ICD-9-CM, and Procedures in SNOMED CT + CPT.
3-naive.prompt_text: Find all patients with coronary heart disease, including those with documented coronary artery disease diagnoses or who have undergone coronary revascularization procedures such as coronary artery bypass grafting or percutaneous coronary intervention.

3-broad.raw_response:
The count holds at 1,232 — all CAD diagnoses are well-covered. All three queries are validated. Here is the complete picture:

| Query | Resource | Matches |
|---|---|---|
| CAD diagnoses (SNOMED + ICD-10-CM + ICD-9-CM) | Condition | 1,232 |
| CABG procedures (SNOMED + CPT) | Procedure | 88 |
| PCI procedures (SNOMED + CPT) | Procedure | 375 |

**How the phenotype was built:**
- **Playbook 1 (Subtypes):** Condition codes span the full CAD family — umbrella SNOMED codes (`414545008` ischemic heart disease, `53741008` coronary arteriosclerosis, `443502000` coronary atherosclerosis), multi-vessel disease, and asymptomatic/unspecified forms; matched to ICD-10-CM I25.1–I25.84/I25.9 and ICD-9-CM 414.0/414.9 as seen in the live server data.
- **Playbook 6 (Procedurally defined):** CABG captured via NCQA/VSAC-validated SNOMED procedure codes (232717009 and variants) + CPT 33510–33536; PCI captured via SNOMED codes (36969009, 415070008, and 13 variants for stent, balloon, atherectomy, rotablation) + CPT 92920–92943.
- **Playbook 12 (Cohort = OR):** Three queries are unioned — a patient qualifies if they have ANY of the diagnosis OR CABG OR PCI evidence.

From clinical experience, CHD patients are documented in different ways: most have a formal CHD diagnosis (coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, or extent-specific variants like multi-vessel disease), most are on secondary prevention medications (aspirin, clopidogrel, statins, beta blockers), and many have undergone revascularization procedures (CABG or PCI/stent placement).

1. Patients with any CHD diagnosis (coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, triple vessel, multi-vessel, or left main disease)

3. Patients who have undergone coronary revascularization procedures (CABG, PCI, stent placement, or balloon angioplasty)

## 📊 Complete Query Reference Summary

| # | Query | Resource | Code System | Clinical Target |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1.1 | ICD-10 hierarchical `I25.*` | `Condition` | ICD-10-CM `:below` | All chronic ischemic heart disease |
| 1.2 | ICD-10 explicit 17-code list | `Condition` | ICD-10-CM | CHD fallback (no subsumption) |
| 1.3 | SNOMED coronary arteriosclerosis + IHD | `Condition` | SNOMED CT | SNOMED-coded diagnoses |
| 2.1 | Aspirin + Clopidogrel | `MedicationRequest` | RxNorm | Antiplatelet therapy |
| 2.2 | 5 statins (all intensities) | `MedicationRequest` | RxNorm | LDL-lowering therapy |
| 2.3 | Carvedilol | `MedicationRequest` | RxNorm | Beta-blockade post-MI |
| 3.1 | CABG (SNOMED, 6 codes) | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | Surgical revascularization |
| 3.2 | PCI / stent / PTCA (SNOMED) | `Procedure` | SNOMED CT | Percutaneous revascularization |
| 3.3 | CABG (CPT, 10 codes) | `Procedure` | CPT | Surgical revascularization |
| 3.4 | PCI / stent / PTCA (CPT, 11 codes) | `Procedure` | CPT | Percutaneous revascularization |

## ⚙️ Implementation Notes

### Building the Union Population
Each query returns a FHIR `Bundle`. To assemble the final CHD population list:
1. Extract all **unique `Patient` resource IDs** from the `subject` reference of each returned `Condition`, `MedicationRequest`, or `Procedure` resource (or from `_include`d Patient resources).
2. Take the **set union** across all 10 query result sets.
3. Deduplicate by `Patient.id` — the same patient may appear in multiple query groups.

### Recommended Additions
| Scenario | Addition |
|---|---|
| Catch lapsed prescriptions | Add `status=active,stopped,on-hold` to Groups 2 queries |
| Include inactive/resolved diagnoses | Add `clinical-status=active,inactive,resolved` to Group 1 queries |
| Capture `MedicationStatement` records | Mirror Group 2 queries against `MedicationStatement` resource |
| Add metoprolol succinate (common beta-blocker) | Add RxNorm `866514` to Query 2.3 |
| Add ticagrelor (P2Y12 inhibitor) | Add RxNorm `1116632` to Query 2.1 |
| Add pitavastatin, fluvastatin to statin sweep | Add RxNorm `861634`, `40790` to Query 2.2 |
| Paginate large populations | Append `&_count=200` and follow `Bundle.link[next]` |

I need to identify my complete coronary heart disease patient population for a secondary prevention adherence quality initiative. From clinical experience, CHD patients are documented in different ways: most have a formal CHD diagnosis (coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, or extent-specific variants like multi-vessel disease), most are on secondary prevention medications (aspirin, clopidogrel, statins, beta blockers), and many have undergone revascularization procedures (CABG or PCI/stent placement).

Please run multiple FHIR queries to capture the full population:
1. Patients with any CHD diagnosis (coronary arteriosclerosis, ischemic heart disease, triple vessel, multi-vessel, or left main disease)
2. Patients prescribed secondary prevention medications (aspirin, clopidogrel, statins, or carvedilol)
3. Patients who have undergone coronary revascularization procedures (CABG, PCI, stent placement, or balloon angioplasty)

For each query, return the matching resources. I want the union of all patients found.

### Key Design Decisions for Your Quality Initiative
| Decision | Rationale |
|---|---|
| **All 3 code systems in Condition** | This server triple-codes every Condition — ICD-9 alone covered 643, but SNOMED/ICD-10 already subsume all of them |
| **Ingredient-level RxNorm only** | Server confirmed `83367` (atorvastatin), `1191` (aspirin), `20352` (carvedilol) — product-level VSAC codes would return zero |
| **Lovastatin/fluvastatin excluded** | Both returned 0 on live server — not in dataset |
| **CABG via CPT 33510–33536** | Full vein-only, arterial, and hybrid graft families; matches server's actual CPT coding |
| **PCI via 7 CPT codes** | Covers PTCA, atherectomy, stenting, bypass graft revascularization, acute MI intervention, and CTO |
| **Union, not intersection** | Patients who are med-treated but lack a diagnosis code, or procedure-evidenced but undiagnosed, are captured by separate queries |

### 📋 Design Notes for Your Quality Initiative

| Point | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Union logic** | Take the distinct set of `patient` references across all three queries — a patient appearing in any one qualifies |
| **Medication breadth** | Ingredient-level RxNorm codes catch all doses/brand formulations (e.g., `83367`=atorvastatin captures 10 mg, 20 mg, 40 mg, 80 mg, Lipitor, generics) |
| **ICD-9 inclusion** | Retained for historical records pre-2015 transition; the server actively uses them |
| **Statin scope** | Includes all four agents most common in CHD: simvastatin, atorvastatin, rosuvastatin, pravastatin. Lovastatin/fluvastatin/pitavastatin can be added if needed |
| **Procedure dual-coding** | Server stores both SNOMED and CPT on the same Procedure resource; the comma-separated query will match on either |

### Key Design Decisions
- **Code systems confirmed live**: Server uses SNOMED CT + ICD-10-CM for Conditions, RxNorm *ingredient-level* for MedicationRequests (e.g. `36567` simvastatin, not the clinical drug form), and SNOMED CT + CPT for Procedures.
- **Dual-system Condition query**: SNOMED provides semantic breadth (umbrella + specific subtypes); ICD-10-CM catches billing-coded records that may not have a SNOMED equivalent.
- **No ICD-9-CM added**: Server samples showed ICD-9 present but all CHD records had matching SNOMED/ICD-10; adding ICD-9 would risk duplication without adding patients.
- **Pravastatin excluded from final query**: Code `42463` returned 0 records — confirmed absence on this server.
- **CABG covered by both SNOMED umbrella (`232717009`) + full CPT 33510–33536 range**: SNOMED catches EHR-coded records; CPT codes catch claims-sourced procedures.

> **Note:** "CHD" may refer to **Coronary Heart Disease** (IHD) or **Congenital Heart Disease**. Queries below cover both interpretations.

---

### Step 1 — Find CHD Conditions (with linked Patients)

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|13213009,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Q24.9&_include=Condition:subject
```

---

### Step 2 — Find CHD Patients + Reverse-Include Their Procedures

```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|13213009,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Q24.9&_revinclude=Procedure:patient
```

### Step 3 — Find Procedures Performed on CHD Patients (with reason codes)

```
Procedure?reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|13213009,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|Q24.9&_include=Procedure:patient
```

|---|---|---|
| SNOMED CT | `53741008` | Coronary Heart Disease (CHD/IHD) |
| SNOMED CT | `13213009` | Congenital Heart Disease |

| ICD-10-CM | `Q24.9` | Congenital heart disease, unspecified |

## FHIR Queries: CHD Diagnosis + Coronary Revascularization Procedure

---

### 🎯 Primary Query — Patient Anchor with Double `_has` (AND Logic)

Both `_has` clauses must be satisfied simultaneously by the **same Patient**, enforcing the AND requirement at the resource level:

```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|413844008,http://snomed.info/sct|414024009,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.110,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.5&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|232717009,http://snomed.info/sct|415070008,http://snomed.info/sct|11101003,http://snomed.info/sct|175066001&_revinclude=Condition:patient&_revinclude=Procedure:patient
```

---

### 🔍 Supplementary Condition Verification Query

To independently confirm CHD diagnoses for matched patients:

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|413844008,http://snomed.info/sct|414024009,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.110,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.5&clinical-status=active&_include=Condition:patient
```

---

### 🔍 Supplementary Procedure Verification Query

To independently confirm revascularization procedures for matched patients:

```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|232717009,http://snomed.info/sct|415070008,http://snomed.info/sct|11101003,http://snomed.info/sct|175066001&status=completed&_include=Procedure:patient
```

---

### 📋 Code Reference Table

| Clinical Concept | System | Code | Display |
|---|---|---|---|
| Coronary arteriosclerosis (CAD) | SNOMED CT | `53741008` | Coronary arteriosclerosis |
| Chronic ischemic heart disease | SNOMED CT | `413844008` | Chronic ischemic heart disease |
| Disorder of coronary artery | SNOMED CT | `414024009` | Disorder of coronary artery |
| Atherosclerotic heart disease, native vessel | ICD-10-CM | `I25.10` | Atherosclerotic heart disease, no angina |
| Atherosclerotic heart disease with unstable angina | ICD-10-CM | `I25.110` | ASHD with unstable angina |
| Ischemic cardiomyopathy | ICD-10-CM | `I25.5` | Ischemic cardiomyopathy |
| **CABG** | SNOMED CT | `232717009` | Coronary artery bypass grafting |
| **PCI** | SNOMED CT | `415070008` | Percutaneous coronary intervention |
| **PTCA** | SNOMED CT | `11101003` | Percutaneous transluminal coronary angioplasty |
| Coronary artery bypass graft | SNOMED CT | `175066001` | Coronary artery bypass graft operation |

---

### 🏗️ `_has` Logic Diagram

```
Patient
  ├─ _has:Condition:patient:code = [CHD codes]       ← MUST exist
  └─ _has:Procedure:patient:code = [Revasc codes]    ← MUST exist
       ↓
  Both satisfied? → Patient returned in result set
  _revinclude=Condition:patient  → CHD record(s) bundled
  _revinclude=Procedure:patient  → Revascularization record(s) bundled
```

> **Note:** Each `_has` clause independently filters; the FHIR server applies **AND** semantics across multiple `_has` parameters on the same resource type anchor. Comma-separated codes within a single `_has` act as **OR** (any matching code qualifies).

### Primary Query (Single-Pass AND Logic)

### With Status Filters (Recommended for Clinical Use)

```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|414545008,http://snomed.info/sct|233817007,http://snomed.info/sct|371803003,http://snomed.info/sct|371804009&_has:Condition:patient:clinical-status=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical|active,http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/condition-clinical|chronic&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|232717009,http://snomed.info/sct|415070008,http://snomed.info/sct|36969009,http://snomed.info/sct|68466008&_has:Procedure:patient:status=completed
```

---

### With `_include` to Return Supporting Resources

```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|414545008,http://snomed.info/sct|233817007,http://snomed.info/sct|371803003,http://snomed.info/sct|371804009&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|232717009,http://snomed.info/sct|415070008,http://snomed.info/sct|36969009,http://snomed.info/sct|68466008&_revinclude=Condition:patient&_revinclude=Procedure:patient
```

### Logic Breakdown

| Layer | Operator | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| `_has:Condition` **AND** `_has:Procedure` | **AND** | Patient must satisfy **both** `_has` blocks |
| Codes within each `_has` (comma-separated) | **OR** | Any one matching code satisfies that block |
| `_has:Condition:patient:code` | — | Scopes the reverse join to `Condition.subject` → Patient |
| `_has:Procedure:patient:code` | — | Scopes the reverse join to `Procedure.subject` → Patient |

```

| Drug Class | Role in MI Prevention |
|---|---|
| **Statins** | Lower LDL cholesterol; plaque stabilization |

## FHIR Queries — Secondary Prevention Medications for Coronary Heart Disease

### 🩸 Antiplatelet Agents (Aspirin, Clopidogrel)
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1191,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|32968&status=active&intent=order&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

### 💊 High-Intensity Statins (Atorvastatin, Simvastatin)
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|83367,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|36567&status=active&intent=order&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

### ❤️ Beta Blockers (Carvedilol)
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20352&status=active&intent=order&_include=MedicationRequest:patient
```

---

### 📋 Parameter Reference

| Drug Class | Medication | RxNorm Code |
|---|---|---|
| Antiplatelet | Aspirin | `1191` |
| Antiplatelet | Clopidogrel | `32968` |
| Statin | Atorvastatin | `83367` |
| Statin | Simvastatin | `36567` |
| Beta Blocker | Carvedilol | `20352` |

### Key Notes
- **Comma-separated codes** within the same `code=` parameter apply **OR logic** — returns any matching medication in that class
- `status=active` limits to **currently active prescriptions**
- `intent=order` filters for **clinical orders** (excludes proposals/plans)
- `_include=MedicationRequest:patient` pulls the **associated Patient resource** in the same bundle
- To search across all drug classes in a **single query**, chain all RxNorm codes in one `code=` parameter with commas

```

---

### Query Breakdown

| RxNorm Code | Drug | Class | CHD Secondary Prevention Role |
|---|---|---|---|
| `1191` | Aspirin | Antiplatelet | Post-ACS/PCI antiplatelet therapy |
| `32968` | Clopidogrel | P2Y12 inhibitor | DAPT after ACS/stent |

| `36567` | Simvastatin | Statin | LDL lowering post-MI/PCI |

> **Comma-separated values** in FHIR act as a logical **OR**, returning any MedicationRequest matching any of the five codes in a single round trip.

### ⚠️ Cross-Indication Noise — Refinement Options

Because these drugs have heavy cross-indication use, the raw result set will include non-CHD prescriptions. To narrow to secondary prevention intent, consider chaining additional filters:

**Filter by active/completed status only:**
```
MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1191,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|32968,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|83367,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|36567,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20352&status=active,completed
```

MedicationRequest?code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|1191,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|32968,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|83367,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|36567,http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|20352&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|22298006,http://snomed.info/sct|413439005

## FHIR Query — CHD Cohort Full Clinical Context (Single Round-Trip)

```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|53741008,http://snomed.info/sct|414545008,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.10,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|I25.110&_revinclude=Condition:patient&_revinclude=MedicationRequest:patient&_revinclude=Procedure:patient
```

---

## Parameter Breakdown

| Parameter | Role | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| `_has:Condition:patient:code=...` | **Cohort filter** — reverse chain into Condition | Only return Patients who *have* a linked CHD Condition |
| `http://snomed.info/sct\|53741008` | Coronary arteriosclerosis (CHD) | Primary SNOMED CT CHD code |
| `http://snomed.info/sct\|414545008` | Ischemic heart disease | Broader SNOMED CT CHD concept |
| `http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm\|I25.10` | Atherosclerotic heart disease, native artery | ICD-10-CM CHD (no angina) |
| `http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm\|I25.110` | Atherosclerotic heart disease with unstable angina | ICD-10-CM CHD (with angina) |
| `_revinclude=Condition:patient` | Pull **all** Conditions for matched patients | Full problem list / comorbidities |
| `_revinclude=MedicationRequest:patient` | Pull **all** MedicationRequests for matched patients | Current & historical prescriptions |
| `_revinclude=Procedure:patient` | Pull **all** Procedures for matched patients | Interventions (e.g., PCI, CABG) |

---

## What the Bundle Returns

```
Bundle
├── Patient/*          ← Patients with a CHD diagnosis
├── Condition/*        ← ALL conditions per patient (full problem list)
├── MedicationRequest/*← ALL medication requests per patient
└── Procedure/*        ← ALL procedures per patient (e.g., stenting, bypass)
```

---

## Key Design Notes

- **Comma-separated codes** on `_has:...:code` act as **OR** — a patient qualifies if they have *any* of the listed CHD codes
- `_has` performs the **reverse chain** filter without requiring a separate Condition query first
- All three `_revinclude` parameters are resolved **server-side in one HTTP request** — true single round-trip
- Add `&_count=50` or `&_page-token=...` for pagination on large CHD cohorts
- Append `&clinical-status=active` inside the `_has` chain to restrict to active diagnoses only (server-dependent support)

---

### Query Anatomy

| Component | Role | Value |
|---|---|---|
| **Base resource** | Cohort anchor | `Patient` |
| **`_has` filter** | Reverse-chain scoping — only return Patients who have a matching Condition | `:Condition:patient:code=...` |
| **`_revinclude=Condition:patient`** | Pull all Conditions back to each matched Patient | `search.mode = include` |
| **`_revinclude=MedicationRequest:patient`** | Pull all MedicationRequests | `search.mode = include` |
| **`_revinclude=Procedure:patient`** | Pull all Procedures | `search.mode = include` |

|---|---|

| Code | Display |
|---|---|

| `414545008` | Ischemic heart disease (disorder) |

#### Coronary Heart Disease — ICD-10-CM
| Code | Display |
|---|---|
| `I25.10` | Atherosclerotic heart disease, native artery, w/o angina |
| `I25.9` | Chronic ischemic heart disease, unspecified |

#### Congenital Heart Disease — ICD-10-CM
| Code | Display |
|---|---|
| `Q21.0` | Ventricular septal defect (VSD) |
| `Q21.1` | Atrial septal defect (ASD) |
| `Q21.3` | Tetralogy of Fallot |
| `Q21.4` | Aortopulmonary septal defect |
| `Q25.0` | Patent ductus arteriosus (PDA) |
| `Q25.1` | Coarctation of aorta |

### Expected Bundle Shape

```
Bundle (searchset)
├── entry[0]: Patient (search.mode = match)   ← _has filter satisfied
├── entry[1]: Patient (search.mode = match)   ← _has filter satisfied
│
├── entry[n]: Condition          (search.mode = include) ← _revinclude
├── entry[n]: Condition          (search.mode = include)
├── entry[n]: MedicationRequest  (search.mode = include) ← _revinclude
├── entry[n]: MedicationRequest  (search.mode = include)
├── entry[n]: Procedure          (search.mode = include) ← _revinclude
└── entry[n]: Procedure          (search.mode = include)
```

> **Note:** `,` within `_has:...:code` is an **OR** (union) — any one matching code qualifies the Patient. `_revinclude` returns **all** resources of that type referencing the matched Patients, not just the CHD-scoping Conditions.

```

### Playbooks Applied

| **1 — Subtypes** | CHD is a family: ischemic heart disease, coronary arteriosclerosis, multi-/triple-vessel disease, native artery atherosclerosis, angina subtypes — all unioned via `,` |
| **8 — Multi-system code list** | Server stores codes in both SNOMED CT **and** ICD-10-CM (confirmed by `fhir_resource_sample`), so both systems are included in one `code=` parameter |
| **11 — Cross-resource AND / `_has`** | `_has:Condition:patient:code=…` filters Patients to only those with a CHD Condition, without a separate Condition query |
| **12 — Cohort** | `_revinclude` expands the bundle to include all clinical resources for each matched patient in one round-trip |

|---|---|---|
